title: Reference: Advisor system v2 — 9 spoke advisors + 5 hub advisors, hierarchy and UX
signal: Advisor system v2 architecture finalized: 9 spoke advisors (Ozi, Marge, Archie, Flo, Will, Jordy, Thad, Mark, Clara) + 5 hub advisors (Octo, Gardener, Spinner, Cartologist, Quartermaster). Four-panel UX layout.
